title: Common Sweetener May Harm Critical Brain Barrier, Risking Stroke - ScienceAlert
description: Common Sweetener May Harm Critical Brain Barrier, Risking Stroke  ScienceAlertIs your “sugar-free” soda causing your brain to age?
